summary: Fase C end-to-end validation complete. Backend: 9/9 pytest cases pass covering catalog analytics (auth + week/month shape), public view tracking increments analytics views, OG share endpoint (HTML + tenant og:title + refresh meta + generic HTML 200 on invalid token), lead->quotation funnel via from_request (persisted + counted in analytics), multi-hotel template publish (2 hospedaje items -> 2 hotels with prices_by_occupancy), and Resend test endpoint returns 400 with Spanish message when not configured. Frontend: login as admin@aventurate.mx works, nav-analytics is visible for company_admin (after auth state settles), /app/analytics renders analytics-totals, analytics-table, period toggles (analytics-period-week/month) and reloads on switch; styled ConfirmDialog (confirm-dialog/confirm-accept/confirm-cancel) appears on Services and Packages delete actions instead of native window.confirm; Settings -> Correo tab renders resend-test-btn and resend-test-email-input cleanly.
critical_code_review_comments: GET /api/catalog/analytics correctly enforces auth (require_tenant) and scopes by tenant_id; quotations count is gated by from_request != None and package_id != None which keeps view_to_quote bounded as designed.

GET /api/share/q/{token}: invalid token gracefully degrades to generic HTML 200 (does not return 500). Per-tenant og:title includes company name + 'Cotización' + code, and includes a meta refresh + JS redirect to /q/{token}. Note: window.location.replace receives a Python repr'd string which works (single quotes) but for safety future change could JSON-encode the SPA URL.

templates._build_package_from_custom now iterates ALL hospedaje custom_items (previously only first) — verified by creating template with 2 hospedaje items and publishing: package contains 2 hotels each with non-zero prices_by_occupancy.
Catalog view tracking is best-effort with try/except wrap around db.catalog_views.insert_one — does not break public_package endpoint if Mongo fails.
ConfirmDialog data-testids (confirm-dialog/confirm-accept/confirm-cancel) wired in Services.jsx and Packages.jsx — verified replacing native window.confirm.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (analytics nav + page + period toggles, confirm dialog on services & packages, resend UI on settings)

seed_data_creation: Created (and best-effort cleaned up) one quotation_template TEST_TPL_MULTIHOTEL_* and its derived package via publish-as-package; created one quotation with from_request='TEST_LEAD_*' tied to package GDL-TEQ-3N (left in DB; analytics counts it as 1 quotation in week period).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Fase C features fully verified. test_iteration30_fase_c.py is the regression suite for catalog analytics, share OG endpoint, funnel from_request, multi-hotel publish and resend 400. Tests are idempotent and use TEST_ prefix. Note: a small amount of seed data (one TEST_ quotation linked to GDL-TEQ-3N) was left behind to allow analytics quotations count assertions to be repeatable; this is harmless. Initial nav-analytics check can return null if executed too fast after login redirect — add a wait_for_load_state('networkidle') + small sleep after wait_for_url, then it is present (confirmed on retest).
